heading: Payment of annuities in coin
label: 114 Payment of annuities in coin
text: The Secretary of the Treasury is authorized to pay in coin such of the annuities as by the terms of any treaty of the United States with any Indian tribe are required to be paid in coin.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2081 derived from , .act Mar. 3, 1865, ch. 127, § 313 Stat. 561
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 2081 derived from , .act Mar. 3, 1865, ch. 127, § 313 Stat. 561
